title: Tramontina Thermal Flask with Cup Lid and Interior Glass Container (Grey, 1.0l)
features: 1 litre vacuum insulated thermal flask with cup lid

Innovative neck design allows you to pour in a conventional way by unscrewing the top, or alternatively by lifting the integral spout, which rotates 360°, for a very precise and targeted action – either way you are assured of a drip free pour
Smooth ergonomic handle for comfort and safety and additional lid which doubles as a convenient cup
Available in a choice of colours: black with a contrasting beige base; rich red with a contrasting beige base; olive green with a contrasting orange base; beige with a contrasting orange base.
It can be used in a variety of settings such as in the home or office and for a variety of hot and cold drinks – tea, coffee, juice, water etc., keeping hot drinks hot and cold drinks cold for longer
description: For the ultimate in convenient and stylish serving, this 1 litre vacuum insulated thermal flask keeps cold drinks cold for up to 9 hours and hot drinks at a perfect drinking temperature for up to 12 hours, due to the interior glass container, so you can enjoy your favourite drink at its best. The neck design allows you to pour in a conventional way by unscrewing the top, or alternatively don’t unscrew but lift the integral spout, which rotates 360°, for a very precise and targeted action – either way you are assured of a drip free pour. It has a smooth ergonomic handle for comfort and safety and also benefits from an additional lid which doubles as a convenient cup – great if you are out and about. It can be used in a variety of settings such as in the home or office and for a variety of hot and cold drinks – tea, coffee, juice, water etc. A choice of colours is available - black, rich red, olive green and beige, so you can have one that complements your setting and suits your taste.
